title: phegopteris obtusata
intro: Phegopteris obtusata, also known as the blunt-lobed lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris obtusata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Phegopteris obtusata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various ways.
